name: Clean Architecture for Flutter
description:
Adds a generator to the New context menu to create the Clean-Architecture folder structure for a given feature.

Getting started

  • Right click on or anywhere in your destination folder
  • New -> Clean Generator -> Flutter
  • Enter [feature_name] in the dialog or let it be empty to create the structure in the current directory
  • Optional: Use the checkbox to split the data_sources folder into local and remote
notes:
